text.title: Page Object Pattern at Scale (Playwright / Cypress) Failure Modes
text.summary: Antipatterns observed when applying Page Object Pattern at Scale (Playwright / Cypress). Each ties a symptom to a root cause and a concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Locator soup — page objects accumulate CSS, XPath, role-based, test-id, and text-based locators in arbitrary mixes, broken by any UI change.
antipattern.root-cause: page object has more than 2 locator priorities used OR > 20% of locators are CSS / XPath without a justifying comment
antipattern.fix: Run scripts/locator-audit.py and fix all CSS/XPath locators that have a role-based alternative. Add data-testid attributes in the UI repo for the rest. Stage this work into a one-time refactor PR; do not let it leak into feature PRs.

antipattern.symptom: Implicit / time-based waits — page object methods include waitForTimeout, sleep, cy.wait(2000), making the suite simultaneously slow and flaky.
antipattern.root-cause: grep -r "waitForTimeout\|cy.wait([0-9]\|setTimeout" pages/ tests/ returns any matches
antipattern.fix: Replace every time-based wait with a condition-based wait: `await locator.waitFor({ state: 'visible' })` in Playwright, `cy.findByRole(...).should('be.visible')` in Cypress. Pre-commit hook rejects new time-based waits.

antipattern.symptom: Fat page objects — single page object accumulates 30+ methods covering features that belong to sub-components, making the file unreadable and high-conflict in git.
antipattern.root-cause: page object file > 400 lines OR > 25 public methods OR > 5 unrelated feature areas in one class
antipattern.fix: Decompose into sub-components: dashboard.page.ts becomes dashboard.page.ts (top-level), dashboard-sidebar.component.ts, dashboard-table.component.ts. Each sub-component has its own contract test.

antipattern.symptom: Test-helper sprawl — `tests/helpers/` accumulates ad-hoc utilities that should be page-object methods, defeating the encapsulation.
antipattern.root-cause: tests/helpers/ directory has > 5 files OR helpers call page.locator / cy.get directly
antipattern.fix: Audit each helper: if it touches DOM, move the logic into the relevant page object as a public method. tests/helpers/ should contain only pure utility code (date formatting, test-data builders) — no DOM interaction.

antipattern.symptom: Contract test snapshot rot — page-object PR updates locators but contract-test snapshot is not regenerated, downstream tests break.
antipattern.root-cause: contract_test.last_passed_at older than 30 days OR contract-test snapshot in git was last edited before the page-object file was last edited
antipattern.fix: Pre-commit hook runs the contract test when the page-object file changes; updates the snapshot in the same PR. Reviewer must read the snapshot diff and confirm the locator change was intentional.

antipattern.symptom: Implementation leak — test files reach into the DOM directly when the page object does not yet expose the needed action, accumulating duplicate selector logic.
antipattern.root-cause: grep -r "page.locator\|cy.get" tests/ returns matches outside pages/ subdirectory
antipattern.fix: For each direct-DOM-access in tests/, add the missing user-action method to the corresponding page object. Pre-commit lint flags any direct DOM access in tests/ from this point forward.
